# External Reference Documents

This directory contains external documents referenced during architecture work.

## Usage

Place external references here that:
- Define regulatory requirements (e.g., GDPR, Woo, Archiefwet)
- Provide industry standards (e.g., ISO, NIST)
- Contain vendor documentation
- Reference best practices

## Supported Formats

- PDF documents
- Markdown documentation
- Links to online resources (in markdown files)

## Examples

- Wet open overheid (Woo) documentation
- AVG/GDPR regulations
- Archiefwet 1995
- ISO/IEC standards
- AWS/Azure/GCP documentation
